content:
Hi Chan — I can help with that.

I don't have any property valuations in the data you've given me, so I can't tell which property is the most expensive. The context I can see is only documents (for example, title deeds for PROP-0001 and PROP-0006), not market values.

What you can do:
- Open your portfolio to see property values and sort by value: [View Portfolio](/portfolio)  
- Or check a specific property page (for example: [/property/PROP-0001](/property/PROP-0001)) and look at its valuation/market data.

If you want, tell me a property ID to check (if you have its value), or I can guide you through finding/sorting valuations in the app. Which would you prefer?
